scripts.dev:api: cd services/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.migrate:api: cd services/api && uv run alembic upgrade head && POSTGRES_DB="$(uv run python -c 'from app.config import settings; print(settings.postgres_db_test)')" uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.seed:api: cd services/api && uv run python scripts/seed_base_data.py
scripts.rpc:schema: cd services/api && uv run python scripts/export_openapi.py
